stemHtml: You are flying on a VFR flight in VMC in a control zone. Suddenly, you realize you are unable to maintain VMC. What are your actions according ICAO Annex 2?

options.b: Continue in IMC and land on the next suitable airport.
options.c: Continue in IMC and land on the next airport which is equipped for instrument approaches.
options.d: Continue to fly in VMC as best as possible and land at the nearest suitable airport immediately.
